free_text: Energy dependence of angular distributions of the
reaction 27Al(p,a)24Mg in the energy region between
10.5 and 14.5 MeV
Department of Nuclear Science, Faculty of
Science
Department of Physics, Faculty of Science
Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
H.Ogata+, Numerical data
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 0.668 mg/cm**2.
Institute for Nuclear Study
To detect scattered alpha. Pressure of A-CO2
gas in counter is changed by incident energy
to stop alpha particles resulting ground state
of 24Mg.
No information on source of uncertainties
On + Yt
ANG-CM is polar angle between beam and alpha in center
of mass system
